## Source: amazon-inspector (25205345915fdf089bcbd90b35f9e852c02281bd7452805479d18c610063ac52)
The package chess-sec-ssrf1 was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (74303ac236c7f5386e2fc96d7ac2a7bbf1d0054efcce03f04a10fe49216bd02e)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'chess-sec-ssrf1' @ 1.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
